title: License key activation not reflecting in n8n
symptom: After adding the license key to the environment variables and redeploying, the paid features remain disabled in the self-hosted n8n instance.
applies_when: Attempting to activate a license key
not_this_if: Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: The issue arises when the environment variable for hiding the usage page is set to true, which prevents the license key activation menu from appearing and the features from being enabled.
fix_steps: Open your environment configuration for n8n
Set the variable N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE to false
Check if the paid features are now enabled
agent_instruction: Set N8N_HIDE_USAGE_PAGE to false and redeploy your n8n instance.
